diagnostics.chalkiness_assessment: Very chalky: all 4/4 predicted Final Four teams were 1- or 2-seeds. The bracket leaned heavily on chalk.
diagnostics.upset_assessment: Reasonable upset volume: 14 upsets predicted (historical mean ~15.5, range 9–21). Conservative brackets (~11–12) tend to outscore balanced ones because wrong upset picks are doubly costly in bracket scoring.
